name: Patient Case
history: Recent divorce and financial difficulties. Relationship since age 19. Has a young son and is settling child support issues. Adjusting to being alone and handling new experiences (e.g., traveling alone with her son, visiting family without a partner).
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I can't handle life on my own.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough to keep a relationship.
coping_strategies: Avoids discussing personal issues and tries to maintain appearances.
situation: At a birthday party, guests mention her divorce during casual conversation. Tries to maintain appearances and later continues thinking about the interaction.
auto_thought: Everyone must think I'm a failure because of my divorce.
behavior: Attempts to appear unaffected and later ruminates about the conversation.
